headline: Sagrada Familia Completes After Decades, Honored by LEGO
meta_description: Barcelona's iconic Sagrada Familia basilica is finally finished, 100 years after architect Gaudí's death. LEGO releases its largest architecture set to celebra…
summary_short: The legendary Barcelona basilica reaches completion this year, marking a century since Gaudí's death and inspiring LEGO's largest architecture model.
body:
Barcelona's Sagrada Familia basilica, one of the world's most distinctive buildings, is finally complete this year—a remarkable milestone coming exactly one hundred years after the death of its visionary architect, Antoni Gaudí. The cathedral's intricate design and ambitious scale made it a multi-generational project, but the finished structure stands as a testament to sustained artistic vision and craftsmanship.

To mark this historic moment, LEGO has created its largest architecture set ever dedicated to the Sagrada Familia. The set joins LEGO's impressive collection of iconic buildings, from New York's skyline to the Eiffel Tower and Rome's Trevi Fountain, bringing Gaudí's masterpiece into homes worldwide.

The completion of Sagrada Familia represents a rare cultural achievement—a project that survived wars, economic shifts, and changing technologies while remaining true to its original artistic purpose. The LEGO tribute ensures that new generations will engage with one of humanity's greatest architectural accomplishments.
